# Unreachable in ASTContext::mergeTypes during Sema of function redeclaration with VLA bounds dependent on nested struct member

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173678
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T06:23:38Z

## Body

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`

### Comment 2 - shafik

Too many of your issues are duplicates, please refrain from submitting more issues until you can address the comments made by me and others on your submissions. Right now your submissions are not adding value and taking up valuable time.
